title: UX and information-architecture audit

preflight.note: Stamped by `repopact new`; the work item was recorded before implementation began.

acceptance_criteria.text: Document a structured cold-walkthrough of first-launch, daily session, Learn→Practice, Practice session, PBQ Lab, Mock, Recall, track switch, and recovery journeys with found/hesitated/failed scores.
Produce a prioritized UX/IA backlog (flow blockers, IA/navigation, seam fixes, polish) and file follow-up work for items not fixed in this pass.
Implement Command Center smart-recommendation CTA so it launches a Practice session scoped to the recommended weak domain (not a generic unscoped lab).
Add Practice domain targeting and honor Learn 'Practice this domain' / study-focus handoffs so Learn→Practice stays on the same domain.
Record nav density / primary-vs-secondary IA recommendation for a follow-up item without a full visual reskin.

source: Steward: UX audit before learner beta (228 deferred); reopened to fix Tauri objectives load for Learn
